question: Top 10 products by revenue this quarter?
sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS product_id,
    p.name AS product_name,
    SUM(o.quantity * p.price) AS revenue
FROM 
    main.orders o
JOIN 
    main.order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN 
    main.products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
WHERE 
    o.order_date >= DATEADD(quarter, -1, CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: What is the total inventory value for each warehouse?
sql:
SELECT 
    warehouse,
    SUM(quantity * cost) AS total_inventory_value
FROM 
    main.inventory
GROUP BY 
    warehouse;
